codeReview.summary: The current repository does implement runtime dotenv autoload in src/main.rs, but the reviewed feature handoff points to commit 58b4cc9 where that product change was not yet committed and no effective regression test covered direct startup dotenv loading. The feature therefore did not satisfy scrutiny requirements at the reviewed commit.

issues.description: The reviewed feature handoff claimed runtime dotenv autoload was already implemented, but commit 58b4cc9 does not include the startup dotenv call now present here. Because the feature commit lacked the product-code change, the reviewed feature could not deliver the promised direct `cargo run` behavior at its own commit.

Commit 58b4cc9 had no focused regression coverage proving startup-time repo-local `.env` loading. The direct-startup regression test exists only in a later fix commit, so the feature’s cited auth-status coverage would not have caught a missing startup dotenv load.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The cli-worker skill now explicitly tells workers to inspect actual diff/behavior before claiming a feature is already implemented, suggesting the earlier procedure was insufficient for this case.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md now includes step 8: "Before claiming a feature is already implemented, inspect the actual diff/behavior..."; the reviewed transcript for worker session 1c077a1c-30aa-46be-ba55-54a513ce6588 claimed success without a corresponding product-code diff in commit 58b4cc9.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library docs were updated later to state that the binary itself must auto-load `./.env` at startup, which indicates this local-debug rule was important enough to record after the failed review gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md documents: "The binary should auto-load `./.env` at startup for local development"; commit e3636d5 also updates `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/cli-surface.md` with the same rule.

summary: Fail: the repository now contains the dotenv autoload and regression test, but they landed after the reviewed feature. At commit 58b4cc9, the feature did not include the product-code change in its diff and lacked effective automated coverage for direct startup dotenv loading.
